docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE TIDES CENTER, A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT PORTER, BRANDON DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 76632755) AS TO DEFENDANT PORTER, BRANDON

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE TIDES CENTER, A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PORTER, BRANDON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 149 6TH STREET, #417 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94103 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 76632755)
DECLARATION RE AUTHENTICITY OF LEASE (TRANSACTION ID # 76632755) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE TIDES CENTER, A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATION
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 76780148)
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE / $0.00 PER DAY(TRANSACTION ID # 76780148) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE TIDES CENTER, A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATION
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PORTER, BRANDON
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT PORTER, BRANDON
